Module io.github.tonywasher.joceanus.gordianknot
Package io.github.tonywasher.joceanus.gordianknot.api.cipher.spec

Interface GordianPBESpecBuilder

public interface GordianPBESpecBuilder
PBE Specification Builder.

  • Method Details

    • usingDigestSpecBuilder

      GordianDigestSpecBuilder usingDigestSpecBuilder()
      Access digestSpecBuilder.
      Returns:
      the digestSpec builder

    • pbKDF2

      GordianPBESpec.GordianPBEDigestAndCountSpec pbKDF2(GordianDigestSpec pDigestSpec, int pCount)
      Create a pbkdf2Spec.
      Parameters:
      pDigestSpec - the digestSpec.
      pCount - the iteration count
      Returns:
      the new spec

    • pkcs12

      Create a pkcs12Spec.

      pDigestSpec - the digestSpec.
      pCount - the iteration count
      Returns:
      the new spec

    • scrypt

      GordianPBESpec.GordianPBESCryptSpec scrypt(int pCost, int pBlockSize, int pParallel)
      Create a scryptSpec.

      pCost - the cost
      pBlockSize - the blockSize
      pParallel - the parallelisation
      Returns:
      the new spec

    • argon2

      GordianPBESpec.GordianPBEArgon2Spec argon2(int pLanes, int pMemory, int pIterations)
      Create an argonSpec.
      Parameters:
      pLanes - the Lanes
      pMemory - the Memory
      pIterations - the iterations
      Returns:
      the new spec
